rationale: In the citing paper, Park, Jun, and MacInnis (2000) appears only in a grouped citation listing domains where default-related effects have been observed (alongside Levav et al. 2010 in product configuration contexts). The paper does not single out this source for theory development, hypothesis derivation, mechanism specification, measurement choices, or interpretation of results. Its role is background exemplification rather than a distinct building block for the article's contribution.
